data.title: CBIZ Launches CBIZ Retirement Advantage PEP (Pooled Employer Plan) to Help Middle-Market Businesses Attract, Retain and Reward Talent by Simplifying Retirement Plan Administration and Enhancing Employee Benefits
data.description: CBIZ, Inc. (NYSE: CBZ), a prominent national professional services advisor, recently unveiled the CBIZ Retirement Advantage PEP on July 23, 2026, in Cleveland. This new retirement solution aims to assist middle-market businesses in streamlining retirement plan administration. It also aims to lower fiduciary responsibilities and offer employees a competitive workplace savings benefit.

data.title: Investors believe oil prices will drop soon despite ongoing conflict, citing low inventories and election impact on Trump's policies.
data.description: The prediction in futures contracts indicates that due to low inventories and the upcoming midterm elections, the Trump administration may be compelled to work towards de-escalating tensions with Iran.

data.title: RTM Engineering Consultants Expands Northwest Arkansas Presence with Addition of Principal David Leiffer
data.description: A renowned engineering firm, RTM Engineering Consultants, has recently bolstered its operations in Northwest Arkansas with the appointment of David Leiffer as Principal. This move signifies the company's commitment to expanding its reach in the region. This strategic expansion is expected to further solidify RTM's position in the area.

data.title: Alen BreatheSmart 25i Earns SleepScore Validated Seal After Independent Study Shows It Delivers the Equivalent of One Extra Night of Sleep Per Month
data.description: The Alen BreatheSmart 25i, based in Austin, Texas, has been awarded the SleepScore Validated Seal following an independent study. The study revealed that using this product provides the same benefits as gaining an additional night of sleep per month.

data.title: Core Spaces Announces Closing of $300+ Million Income-Producing Portfolio of Four Student Housing Communities for Core University Living Real Estate Income Trust
data.description: In Chicago today, Core Spaces revealed the completion of a deal involving a bundle of four purpose-built student housing complexes, with a total value exceeding $300 million. The acquisition was by Core University Living Real Estate Income Trust (CUL REIT), a non-listed REIT specializing in stable student housing investments. This portfolio encompasses over 2,000 beds.

data.title: Polymarket predicts 84% chance of no Fed cuts in 2026 with $44.6M trade volume. Rabobank warns high European gas prices could impact inflation.
data.description: This week, a note from Rabobank cautioned that high European natural gas prices may continue to impact inflation and policy rate forecasts in the region.

data.title: Polymarket GOP nominee odds unchanged for 2028 as Trump warns Iran over potential Houthi attacks. Trump cautioned Iran in recent report.
data.description: In a recent report, former President Donald Trump issued a warning stating that Iran would face accountability for any forthcoming attacks by the Houthi rebels. This statement comes amidst growing tensions, with Trump emphasizing that Iran will be held responsible for any actions taken by the Houthi group. The warning serves as a clear message to both Iran and the Houthi rebels about the potential consequences of their actions. The statement highlights the significance of deterring future attacks and maintaining stability in the region. It underscores the need for all parties involved to act responsibly and avoid escalating conflicts. Trump's message signals a firm stance on addressing security threats and upholding accountability, indicating a commitment to safeguarding peace and security. This development underscores the importance of monitoring and addressing potential security challenges to prevent further escalations.

data.title: Middlefield Income Plus Class ETF Series Distributions
data.description: On July 23, 2026, Middlefield Income Plus Class ETF Series (TSX: MIPC) revealed the upcoming distributions for the third quarter of 2026. The distributions will be disbursed to unitholders of the series. The exact amount of the distributions was not disclosed in the provided information.

data.title: Greene County Bancorp, Inc. Reports Record Fiscal Year 2026 Earnings, Achieves Highest Quarterly Net Income in Company History, and Earns National Top-Performing Bank Recognition
data.description: Catskill, New York, July 23, 2026 - Greene County Bancorp, Inc. announced their financial results for the quarter and fiscal year ending on June 30, 2026. The company, which oversees Bank of Greene County and Greene County Commercial Bank, disclosed a net income of $11.3 million for the quarter, translating to $0.67 per basic and diluted share. For the entire fiscal year, the net income stood at $41.0 million, equating to $2.41 per basic and diluted share. In comparison, the figures for the same periods in 2025 were $9.3 million (quarter) and $31.1 million (fiscal year), with earnings per share at $0.55 and $1.83, respectively. This marks a significant 31.7% increase in net income, amounting to $9.9 million when contrasting the fiscal years ending on June 30, 2026 and 2025.

data.title: NovoMed PARTNERS Officially Launches to Build the Next Generation of Transformative Medical Technology Companies
data.description: A new healthcare innovation and growth platform called NovoMed PARTNERS has been officially launched in Newport Beach, California. Founded by Ramin Mousavi, former CEO of CathWorks, along with co-founders Mike Feher, Fabian Ngo, and Natalie Sickler, the platform aims to revolutionize the healthcare industry. The executive leadership team has extensive experience in building medical technology companies. NovoMed PARTNERS offers a unique perspective with a team that has a combined experience of several decades in the industry.

data.title: Nuclear Innovator Deep Isolation Selected by DOE for Three Project GENESIS Initiatives Advancing AI-Driven Nuclear Waste Research
data.description: Deep Isolation has partnered with Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory and the University of South Carolina on three DOE Project GENESIS awards. The collaboration aims to hasten AI-assisted repository selection, design, and analysis for nuclear waste disposal. This initiative reflects a significant step in leveraging advanced technology for addressing nuclear waste management challenges.

data.title: Middlefield Short Duration Bond Plus ETF Distributions
data.description: Toronto, on July 23rd, 2026 - The Middlefield Short Duration Bond Plus ETF (TSX: MSBP) has disclosed the distribution details for the upcoming quarter. Unitholders of the fund will receive payments for the third quarter of 2026.
